name: ai-zippy-child/services-showcase
title: Services Showcase
description: Grid of healthcare services with image cards and detailed offerings.

default.title: Family Care
default.caption: Providing immediate care for your everyday health needs.

items.title: Acute Illness Management
items.description: Treatment for flu, headaches, and common infections.

items.title: Minor Procedures
items.description: In-clinic wound stitching, dressing, and skin surgeries.

items.title: Dermatological Care
items.description: Expert management for acne, rashes, and hyperpigmentation.

default.title: Chronic Care
default.caption: Partnering with you for long-term health and vitality.

items.title: Chronic Disease Management
items.description: Targeted care for Hypertension, Cholesterol, and Diabetes.

items.title: Respiratory Health
items.description: Dedicated Asthma control and management plans.

items.title: Weight Management
items.description: Evidence-based guidance to help you reach your health goals.

default.title: Women's Medical Care
default.caption: Private and compassionate care tailored to women's health.

items.title: Preventive Screening
items.description: Regular PAP Smears and wellness checkups.

items.title: Life Transitions
items.description: Expert Menopause management and hormonal support.

default.title: Child Medical Care
default.caption: Supporting your child's growth from their very first steps.

items.title: Immunisation
items.description: Full suite of childhood vaccinations and boosters.

items.title: Paediatric Nutrition
items.description: Expert advice to ensure healthy physical and mental growth.

default.title: Vocational Care
default.caption: Efficient medical clearances for work and school requirements.

items.title: Employment Screenings
items.description: Work Permit and Domestic Helper checkups.

items.title: Education Clearances
items.description: OBS, School, and University medical certifications.

default.title: Aesthetic Services
default.caption: Where medical science meets skin confidence.

items.title: Anti-Aging
items.description: Advanced treatments to restore youthful skin and elasticity.

items.title: Clear Skin Solutions
items.description: Specialized medical treatments for acne and scarring.

items.title: Customised Care
items.description: Medical-grade facials and targeted pigmentation therapy.
